name: Build & Publish Mod

# ── WHEN THIS RUNS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1) Automatically, whenever you publish a GitHub Release (recommended).
#    -> The release's tag becomes the version, and the release description
#       becomes the changelog automatically.
# 2) Manually, via the "Run workflow" button (workflow_dispatch), where you
#    can type a custom changelog and pick a release channel. Handy for
#    testing without cutting a real release.
on:
  release:
    types: [published]

  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      changelog:
        description: "Changelog text (Markdown supported)"
        required: false
        default: ""
      version_type:
        description: "Release channel"
        required: true
        default: "release"
        type: choice
        options:
          - release
          - beta
          - alpha

# Only one publish pipeline runs at a time, so two releases can't race
# each other and cause duplicate uploads.
concurrency:
  group: publish-mod
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  # ── EDIT ME: game/loader targets ─────────────────────────────────────
  GAME_VERSIONS: "1.21, 1.21.1"
  JAVA_VERSION: "21"

  # ── EDIT ME: dependencies ────────────────────────────────────────────
  # Format: "<project-slug-or-id>(<scope>)" separated by commas.
  # Scopes: required | optional | embedded | incompatible
  DEPENDENCIES: "fabric-api(required), cloth-config(required), modmenu(optional)"

jobs:
  # ── 1. GAMETEST ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # Runs each loader's headless GameTest server. If any loader's tests
  # fail, the whole pipeline stops here — nothing gets built or published.
  gametest:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false # let all three loaders finish so you see every failure, not just the first
      matrix:
        loader: [fabric, forge, neoforge]
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ env.JAVA_VERSION }}
          cache: gradle

      - run: chmod +x gradlew

      - name: Run GameTest (${{ matrix.loader }})
        run: ./gradlew :${{ matrix.loader }}:runGameTestServer --no-daemon

  # ── 2. BUILD ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # Only starts once every gametest matrix leg has passed. Builds all
  # three loader jars and hands them off as a workflow artifact so the
  # publish jobs below don't need to rebuild anything.
  build:
    needs: gametest
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      mod_version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.value }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ env.JAVA_VERSION }}
          cache: gradle

      - run: chmod +x gradlew

      # The mod's version, published to CurseForge/Modrinth, is read from
      # gradle.properties — the tag/release name is only what triggers the
      # workflow, not the source of truth for the version string.
      - name: Read version from gradle.properties
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(grep '^mod_version=' gradle.properties | cut -d'=' -f2 | tr -d '[:space:]')
          if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then
            echo "::error::mod_version not found in gradle.properties"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Found mod_version=$VERSION"
          echo "value=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      # Safety net: if you tag v1.2.0 but forgot to bump mod_version in
      # gradle.properties to 1.2.0, fail loudly here instead of quietly
      # publishing the wrong version. Only checked on Release triggers,
      # since manual runs don't have a real tag to compare against.
      - name: Verify tag matches gradle.properties version
        if: github.event_name == 'release'
        run: |
          TAG="${{ github.event.release.tag_name }}"
          TAG="${TAG#v}"
          if [ "$TAG" != "${{ steps.version.outputs.value }}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Release tag 'v${TAG}' does not match mod_version '${{ steps.version.outputs.value }}' in gradle.properties. Update gradle.properties or re-tag."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Build all loaders
        run: ./gradlew :fabric:build :forge:build :neoforge:build --no-daemon

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-libs
          path: |
            fabric/build/libs/*.jar
            forge/build/libs/*.jar
            neoforge/build/libs/*.jar
          if-no-files-found: error

  # ── 3. PUBLISH (CurseForge + Modrinth) ──────────────────────────────
  # Downloads the jars built above (no rebuilding) and uploads one
  # version per loader to both platforms.
  publish:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-libs

      - name: Resolve changelog
        id: changelog
        run: |
          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "release" ]; then
            echo "text<<EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "${{ github.event.release.body }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "text<<EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "${{ github.event.inputs.changelog }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Publish Fabric build
        uses: Kir-Antipov/mc-publish@v3.3
        with:
          modrinth-id: ${{ vars.MODRINTH_PROJECT_ID }}
          modrinth-token: ${{ secrets.MODRINTH_TOKEN }}
          curseforge-id: ${{ vars.CURSEFORGE_PROJECT_ID }}
          curseforge-token: ${{ secrets.CURSEFORGE_TOKEN }}
          files: fabric/build/libs/!(*-@(dev|sources|javadoc)).jar
          name: ${{ github.event.release.name || format('Manual build {0}', github.run_number) }}
          version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.mod_version }}
          version-type: ${{ github.event.inputs.version_type || 'release' }}
          changelog: ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.text }}
          loaders: fabric, quilt
          game-versions: ${{ env.GAME_VERSIONS }}
          java: ${{ env.JAVA_VERSION }}
          dependencies: ${{ env.DEPENDENCIES }}
          fail-mode: fail-at-end
          retry-attempts: 2
          retry-delay: 10000

      - name: Publish Forge build
        uses: Kir-Antipov/mc-publish@v3.3
        with:
          modrinth-id: ${{ vars.MODRINTH_PROJECT_ID }}
          modrinth-token: ${{ secrets.MODRINTH_TOKEN }}
          curseforge-id: ${{ vars.CURSEFORGE_PROJECT_ID }}
          curseforge-token: ${{ secrets.CURSEFORGE_TOKEN }}
          files: forge/build/libs/!(*-@(dev|sources|javadoc)).jar
          name: ${{ github.event.release.name || format('Manual build {0}', github.run_number) }}
          version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.mod_version }}
          version-type: ${{ github.event.inputs.version_type || 'release' }}
          changelog: ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.text }}
          loaders: forge
          game-versions: ${{ env.GAME_VERSIONS }}
          java: ${{ env.JAVA_VERSION }}
          dependencies: ${{ env.DEPENDENCIES }}
          fail-mode: fail-at-end
          retry-attempts: 2
          retry-delay: 10000

      - name: Publish NeoForge build
        uses: Kir-Antipov/mc-publish@v3.3
        with:
          modrinth-id: ${{ vars.MODRINTH_PROJECT_ID }}
          modrinth-token: ${{ secrets.MODRINTH_TOKEN }}
          curseforge-id: ${{ vars.CURSEFORGE_PROJECT_ID }}
          curseforge-token: ${{ secrets.CURSEFORGE_TOKEN }}
          files: neoforge/build/libs/!(*-@(dev|sources|javadoc)).jar
          name: ${{ github.event.release.name || format('Manual build {0}', github.run_number) }}
          version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.mod_version }}
          version-type: ${{ github.event.inputs.version_type || 'release' }}
          changelog: ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.text }}
          loaders: neoforge
          game-versions: ${{ env.GAME_VERSIONS }}
          java: ${{ env.JAVA_VERSION }}
          dependencies: ${{ env.DEPENDENCIES }}
          fail-mode: fail-at-end
          retry-attempts: 2
          retry-delay: 10000

  # ── 4. PUBLISH TO MAVEN (optional) ──────────────────────────────────
  # Skipped entirely unless the MAVEN_URL repo variable is set — so mods
  # that don't publish to a maven repo never even spin up this job.
  # Runs alongside `publish`, not after it (both only depend on `build`).
  publish-maven:
    needs: build
    if: vars.MAVEN_URL != ''
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ env.JAVA_VERSION }}
          cache: gradle

      - run: chmod +x gradlew

      - name: Publish to Maven
        env:
          MAVEN_URL: ${{ vars.MAVEN_URL }}
          MAVEN_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.MAVEN_USERNAME }}
          MAVEN_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.MAVEN_PASSWORD }}
        run: ./gradlew :fabric:publish :forge:publish :neoforge:publish --no-daemon
